name: MandateAgent
description: Autonomous agent that executes within human-defined mandates with verifiable onchain compliance. Every action is checked against a bounded mandate, verified by a private reasoning engine, and receipted onchain.

services.name: create-mandate
services.description: Human creates a bounded mandate defining what actions the agent may perform

services.name: execute-with-mandate
services.description: Execute a proposed action within mandate bounds, with onchain receipt

services.name: verify-compliance
services.description: Query onchain receipts to verify full compliance history

trustChain.description: receipt → mandate → Self proof → verified human

layers.name: personhood
layers.purpose: proves mandate creator is a real human
